Description.value: Fixes POI Scourge's CanSwapItems Prefix to also validate cvar_scourge_tokens balance, not just inventory space. Without this fix, rapid clicks at the Scourge Exchange Station can purchase items with insufficient tokens because POI Scourge's RemoveItem clamps cvar to 0 with Math.Max(0f, ...). Implemented as a Harmony Prefix at Priority 900 (runs before POI Scourge's Priority 800), short-circuiting CanSwapItems with __result=false when tokens are insufficient. Defensive only: if POI Scourge is absent the patch is harmless because the scourge-station check returns false. Requires HarmonyX.
